What You'll Learn
Understand the Subtle Art of Storytelling. Learn how to drip aspects of your life
into your daily conversations so people know you better, feel more connected to
you, and trust you more.
Learn techniques for strategically sharing personal information by identifying the
kinds of personal information that are most likely to connect to the people
around you.
Learn how to deploy subtext in your daily life to help define your personality,
brand, and beliefs.
Learn how to use video conferencing so that you can share about yourself and
make more meaningful connections with others.
Learn how to answer the question, “How are you?” the right way.
